text:
CHMTHRPY_ORAL_ADMSN_CD O0110A3A Treatment: Chemo - Oral (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received oral chemotherapy days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
957 CHMTHRPY_ORAL_DSCHRG_CD CHMTHRPY_ORAL_DSCHRG_CD O0110A3C Treatment: Chemo - Oral (Discharge) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received oral chemotherapy in the last three days of their SNF stay.
